features: Double-sided Back Shower Brush: this body brushes for shower is available in soft and hard bristles (hog bristles + nylon bristles), so you can enjoy different levels of comfort simply by turning it over when you take your bath. The back bath brush can be used for wet or dry brushing, the combination of softness and hardness can effectively remove dead skin, leaving skin clean, soft and smooth.

Non-slip Shower Brush: the long-handled back brush you've chosen is 44 cm(17.3") long, with a brush length of 11.5 cm(4.5") and a width of 8 cm(3.2"). Weight: 0.22 kg. The 18 cm（7.1"） long non-slip handle allows you to hold the bath brush freely while bathing. The anti-slip effect is even more effective, making your bath more comfortable and free. Easy to clean on all parts of the body, such as back and legs.

Durable and Hygienic: the hard, soft bristles at the back of the back washer are tightly bonded to the brush head so that the bristles don't come loose easily and the high-quality bristles are extremely durable. The PP handle on the HORJOR soft body brush won't mildew or harbour bacteria like ordinary body brushes. And it lasts longer.

Skin Renewal: Combat skin problems year-round with our double-sided back scrubber. The combination of hard natural bristles and soft nylon bristles ensures thorough cleansing, unblocks lymphatic flow, and revitalizes your skin, leaving it smooth and renewed.
Etachable Design: The body brush head has a detachable design for easy and thorough cleaning and replacement. After each use, simply rinse with water to keep the bristles clean and hygienic.
description: Product Description The one side of this body brushes for shower are made from soft natural bristle, which are strong and flexible, don't easily warp, resist moisture and are unaffected by heat or cold. The other side is made of soft nylon bristles. The brush is designed to meet your bathing needs. This shower brush with long handle not only massages the skin and thoroughly cleans away dirt, it also protects sensitive skin. As well as looking after our own health, we also have to look after the hygiene of our bath brushes. The handle of our long-handled bath brush is made from PP and PBT, which are less likely to harbour bacteria, won't crack and last longer. More care for your skin. The brush exfoliator have 44 cm (17.3") long, with a brush length of 11.5 cm (4.5") and a width of 8 cm (3.2"). Anti-slip shower brush The anti-slip effect is even more effective, making your bath more comfortable and freer. The shower back scrubber have 18 cm（7.1"） long non-slip handle allows you to hold the brush freely while bathing. The back cleaner for shower make you easy to clean on all parts of the body, such as the back and legs. This double-sided non-slip body exfoliator brush features multiple non-slip granular bumps on the handle, making it easier to grip than the usual smooth, rounded handle. Get the most out of your bath back scrubber. Weight: 0.22 kg Material: mildew-resistant PP handle + soft PBT bristles & natural pig bristles Total brush length: 44cm (17.3") Suitable for: men, women Double-sided body brus: Can be brushed wet or dry The bristles on this body brush are made from soft PBT & natural pig bristles. You apply bath soap or soap to the wet bristles and rub them with your hands or directly on your body to lather them up easily. remove foam quickly Although the bristles of the bath brush long handle for shower are fine, they are extremely easy to clean. The Body Cleansing Shower Brush has enough space at the base of the bristles to remove hidden hairs from the bath brush by rinsing it directly under running water. Easy storage After washing, store the long-handled shower brush with a string to keep it close at hand, or without a string to hang it in a low air vent. In this way, the washed shower brush quickly returns to its original condition. The benefits of using a bath brush when taking a bath: Protection against skin diseases: the long-handled bath brush cleans the back thoroughly and reduces damage caused by pores blocked by sebum (for example, acne caused by a poorly cleansed back). More self-confidence: using the soft, stiff bath brush stimulates the lymph nodes, improves blood circulation, eliminates toxins and exfoliates the skin, resulting in smoother skin and no longer having to worry about wearing halter dresses, shorts and other revealing clothes in summer. enefit even more from your bath: the nylon bristles of the shower brush are denser and more comfortable, protecting sensitive skin and thoroughly cleaning the surface of the skin, allowing your body to relax effectively after a long day's work. Directions 1. Choose between soft and hard bristles by turning the brush over. 2. Use the brush for wet or dry brushing. 3. Hold the brush with its non-slip handle while bathing. 4. Clean the brush after each use by rinsing with water. 5. If needed, detach the brush head for more thorough cleaning or replacement. Safety Warning Use with caution. Discontinue use if skin irritation occurs. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use on damaged or irritated skin. See more
